overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxurious rooftop garden and water feature in a futuristic tropical setting from Cyberpunk 2077. The character walks through shallow reflecting pools, ascends modern concrete water steps, and explores the landscaped terrace surrounded by palm trees and high-tech architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury rooftop reflecting pool with tropical landscaping

agents.ego_description: walking along the shallow pool edge toward a tiered concrete water feature with palm trees towering ahead

entered.detail: shallow water feature with clear reflections of palm trees and sky
tall tropical palm trees lining the background
tall high-tech communications tower with multiple antenna arrays
sleek contemporary building with reflective glass facade
reddish-brown rock formations with tropical plants
futuristic holographic signage floating near the building
modern geometric concrete steps with water flowing down the sides

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a luxurious rooftop garden with a shallow reflecting pool surrounded by tropical palm trees. The camera moves forward along the water's edge toward a modern tiered concrete structure, with a futuristic tower visible in the background and holographic billboards floating near a glass building on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: tiered concrete water steps with cascading waterfalls

events.description: begins ascending the concrete water steps, transitioning from pool level to upper terrace
concrete walls temporarily block the view of the pool and skyline as the camera climbs

agents.ego_description: climbing up the multi-level concrete water steps, briefly looking down to see own feet and shadow on the gravel surface at the top

entered.detail: textured gravel ground at the top of the water feature
water flowing down the concrete tiered channels
dark concrete walls flanking the staircase

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the modern concrete water steps, moving through a narrow corridor formed by dark retaining walls. Water cascades down the sides of the steps as the view temporarily narrows, then opens up to a gravel surface at the top where the character's feet and shadow become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated garden terrace overlooking the reflecting pool

events.description: turns around at the top of the steps to face the reflecting pool from an elevated vantage point

agents.ego_description: reaching the upper terrace and turning to overlook the entire pool and garden area from above before walking along the edge

entered.detail: reddish-brown pagoda-style roof structure among the rocks
smooth concrete paving of the upper terrace level
green lily pads floating in the shallow water sections

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the elevated terrace, the camera turns to reveal a sweeping view of the reflecting pool from above. The traditional pavilion roof appears among the rocky landscaping on the left, while lily pads float in the water below. The character walks along the terrace edge overlooking the entire garden complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: poolside walkway with floating lily pads

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete pathway at the pool's edge, passing sections with lily pads and approaching the open pool area

entered.detail: smooth light-colored concrete border along the water

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking along the concrete walkway at the pool's edge, with lily pads floating in the shallow water to the left. The view opens up to show the full reflecting pool with palm trees and the futuristic tower in the distance, completing the circuit of the rooftop garden.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a luxurious rooftop garden that transitions from a low-level water feature to an elevated terrace before returning to the pool's edge. It begins by gliding along a shallow reflecting pool flanked by tropical palm trees, moving toward a tiered concrete structure while holographic billboards float near a glass building. As the camera ascends the concrete water steps, the view narrows within a corridor of dark retaining walls with cascading water before opening onto a gravel surface where the character's feet and shadow appear. The scene then expands across an elevated terrace, revealing a sweeping overhead view of the garden complex, lily pads, and a traditional pavilion roof nestled among rocky landscaping. Finally, the camera turns back toward the concrete walkway, walking alongside the water to reveal the full expanse of the reflecting pool and the futuristic tower in the distance.
